creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Aleks Not enough information provided to understand the issue. Please re-open if you can provide more details of issue, clearly describing:

- The expected behaviour
- The actual behaviour (the problem) and the affect that it has
- Steps to reproduce (if/where required)

Please also include:

* Complete/exact system information, including:

- uname -a output
- /etc/rc.conf output (as an attachment, sanitized if necessary)
- full firewall ruleset (as an attachment, sanitized if necessary)
